title: The Vanishing Act of the Museo Nacional

scenes.text: An art heist that pulled off the unimaginable from a national museum.
This stunning art theft occurred at the Museo Nacional in Mexico City.
In 1985, thieves stole pieces worth millions, including pre-Columbian art.
Despite the value, many artifacts remain missing and lost to time.
scenes.label: ART HEIST UNSOLVED

scenes.text: Follow for the cases that were never solved.

description: 📍 Mexico City, Mexico - 1985. An ambitious heist led to the theft of priceless pre-Columbian art from the Museo Nacional, and many pieces remain missing. Follow for daily cold cases!
